## Trajectory

**Velocity.** Today: 4 substantive merges (Z-scoping + Z1 + Z1b + Case3Witness analysis) + 2 in flight (Z2 + cap-5). Two parallel arcs (Frankl Lean Z-arc + 1/3-2/3 Case3Witness fix) running cleanly per Daniel parallelize directive.

**Budget.** Cumulative Frankl Lean arc spend: ~7.3M (L+X+Y) + 0.65M (Z1+Z1b, today) = ~8M. Z-arc projection 3.40-4.60M total → ~11-12M cumulative by Z10. Multi-month target.

**Bottleneck.** Single primary: the Z-arc IS the bottleneck by design — Daniel chose full mathlib infrastructure over shortcuts. Z1+Z1b GREEN day-1 is a strong leading indicator that the polecat workflow scales to mathlib-PR-grade infrastructure work. Sub-split contingency (Z1a/Z1b pre-auth + Z2a/Z2b ready) is the operational safety net.

**Risk watchlist.** Asymptotic-AMBER convergence pattern (per feedback_asymptotic_amber_convergence_signals_encoding_issue): if Z-arc produces 5-8+ AMBER cycles each strictly tighter but only quantitative-narrowing, pause and surface to Daniel BEFORE next iteration. The Z9 encoding-level sidestep of Y6's structural blocker is a positive signal that the Z-arc encoding IS the fix; verify rather than assume across the full chain.

**1/3-2/3 side.** Case3Witness paint-by-numbers diagnosis substantially advanced today; cap-5 fix in flight; downstream architectural blockers (mg-b666 + Steps 1-7 w₀(γ)) remain parked. M1 (full gap-free width-3 proof) not progressing; M2 (full formalization) gated on M1. Daniel's α/β/γ choice deferred β/γ pending cap-5 surfacing the full type-error landscape.
